blocks.content: Amy pointed her finger at Screamer.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Who else would I be talking to? Honestly, the martial artist's killer strategy failed, didn't it? I could understand up to that point, but why take it out on an innocent team member?
Screamer's face went blank.
No matter how emotional he was, he usually considered the context.
In contrast, Shirone's group was pushing forward recklessly without any plan.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Are they all crazy?

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: If you let emotions take over, you'll only be used.
And Screamer immediately found a way.
This was an opportunity.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: If he could easily gain 20 points at the cost of losing 5, it wasn't a bad deal.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Any team with Maya will lose.
Having made his decision, Screamer made a proposal.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Fine, if you're so confident, how about we test it?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Test it?

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: You know there's an overall evaluation in two weeks, right? Hill Capture. If you can beat me with Maya on your team, I'll acknowledge it.
Hill Capture involves placing flags in both camps and balancing offense and defense to capture the opponent's flag.
In the graduation exam, it's 15 vs. 15, but in the group evaluation, it's a 5 vs. 5 mini-game.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As expected of the senior class. They really know how to dig in.
Shirone saw through Screamer's strategy.
He planned to include Maya, whom he considered a weak link, in their team to secure 20 points.
As Shirone hesitated to answer, Screamer grinned.
His red tongue flicked out.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: This was why you shouldn't rush in blindly.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: What? Are you scared now that it's time to do it? After all that big talk?
After a long pause, Shirone spoke.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's true that Maya's sound magic is below average.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Haha! Finally admitting it! So, you realize you're at a disadvantage...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But.
Shirone's face twisted in disdain.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She's still better than having someone like you on the team.
Screamer closed his mouth and wiped his expression.
His eyes, which once made gangsters tremble, glared at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Does that mean you're accepting?
Shirone turned to his friends.
Guys.
Iruki, Nade, and Amy stepped forward, flanking Shirone.
Amy wiggled her fingers and said,

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Yeah, let's do it. You'll need the best team to stand a chance. But you'll still get crushed.
The one who was most taken aback by the situation was Maya.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: She had failed the evaluation and been scolded.
Normally, that would be the end of it, but now it had escalated beyond her control.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: She was grateful to Shirone's group for standing up for her, but she didn't want to be a burden.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Wait, I didn't mean for this to...
Before she could finish, Nade pulled her into a hug.
As Maya's face turned red and she tried to speak, Nade raised his fist and shouted at Screamer.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Let's settle this!
Nade's voice echoed loudly.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: There were no regrets.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: It felt like all the pent-up frustration from the senior class was being released.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: 'Yeah, this is how Shirone's group should be.'
Maya, on the other hand, turned pale.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: But she couldn't dampen the fiery spirit of Shirone's group.
Screamer controlled his anger.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Logically, it was as good as a victory.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: They would lose 20 points, and he would gain 20.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: See you in two weeks.
Screamer left the training ground.
The students were stunned, unable to believe what had just happened.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: 'What are they, a bunch of brawlers?'
Sabina, standing next to Dante, sighed.

blocks.speaker: Sabina
blocks.content: This is crazy. Why do they keep causing trouble? With Maya, they're obviously at a disadvantage. Now Nade's going to lose 20 points. Shouldn't Shirone have stopped them?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: You didn't know?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Shirone is the leader of the troublemakers.
Shirone's group gathered at the Paranormal Science Research Club for a relaxing time.
With training and Gaold's mission, Shirone barely had enough time in a day, but he joined his friends to clear his mind.
Lying on the sofa, staring at the ceiling on a holiday felt incredibly refreshing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why hadn't he appreciated such moments before, always complaining about boredom?
Shirone recalled the events from a few days ago.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, Maya is a commoner. I didn't know.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Me neither. I looked into it after that day, and it turns out she's an outsider.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: An outsider?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: She's from the Mystique Tribe, a small ethnic group from the south.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: About 200 of them settled in Tormia, cultivating their traditional herb, Kapura, for medicinal use.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: But 20 years ago, it was classified as a drug, and they lost everything.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: They couldn't integrate into society, burdened with debt and the stigma of being a drug tribe.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I see. So Maya's family must be struggling.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Probably. She has seven siblings.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: The tribe pooled their money to support her.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: If she becomes a magician, it would improve the Mystique Tribe's reputation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But how did she get into the magic school?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Teacher Collie recommended her.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I don't know the details, but there must have been some connection, like with you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Though Collie was a strict head teacher in the senior class, he was kind-hearted and likely helped Maya.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There were rumors at the time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But when her grades turned out to be unimpressive, it just faded away.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Was that a blessing in disguise?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway, it's really unfortunate.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She must feel immense pressure.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The tribe's expectations are on her, and she can't graduate.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Seeing her gulping down meat with water to increase her volume was pitiful.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone felt the same.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Want to see what Maya used to look like?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Huh? How?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Back then, Nade collected a lot. Remember? The picture book.
Shirone suddenly remembered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, the one published by the Women's Anatomy Research Club?
Nade sat up from the sofa.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: That's right! We're in the senior class now.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Most of the repeaters would be in there.
Without waiting for a response, Nade dove under the desk.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: The latest issue is the most accurate. Issue 48, page 8.
Iruki, who never forgot, said,

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Issue 48? That's last year's.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Maya would have been overweight then.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: You'll see. Just get it.
Nade rummaged through the picture books piled in the safe.
Since Shirone joined, he had lost interest, but he couldn't bring himself to throw them away.
Let's see. Issue 48, Issue 48...
Ah, here it is.
Nade placed the picture book on the table, and Shirone and Iruki leaned in.
Page 8 showed Maya's previous appearance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow...

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: For a work by the Women's Anatomy Research Club, it was modest and portrayed her in a sacred manner.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: But that wasn't why they were surprised.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is this really Maya? She's so pretty.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I remember. I wondered who she was when I saw this picture.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Maya started gaining weight in her second year of the senior class.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: But the Women's Anatomy Research Club seems to only draw her previous appearance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's strange. Do they like Maya?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Maybe. But it feels more like respect than affection.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who are they, the Women's Anatomy Research Club?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I don't know.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: If they're caught, they're expelled immediately.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: But they must be in the senior class.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: They couldn't draw the senior class while being in the advanced class.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thinking about it gave him chills.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Let's check the others.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Based on last year, there should be girls in the senior class now.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Page 14 has Pony, page 16 has Suabi, and the last page has Dorothy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You really remember this because of your servant, right?
Nade pointed to the page.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Hey, it's Pony.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Pony's appearance was the same as now.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Her symmetrical part emphasized her high forehead, and her golden hair framed her face.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wearing a dress that exposed her shoulders and collarbone, she exuded royal elegance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, here's Suabi.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Kneeling by a stream, Suabi was covered with a blanket over her bare body.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A bird perched on her cupped hands, and she wore a beautiful smile never seen at school.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's Dorothy? She looks so different here.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dorothy wore a black woolen knit, pulling up the hem with a rebellious expression.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Her slender waist and cute belly button were exposed, and she wore only underwear, highlighting her long, giraffe-like legs.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Her tin doll, which she never parted with, was hugging her neck.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I've always thought, but these drawings are amazing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They look just like the real thing.
Nade closed the picture book with a snap.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Man, there are so many beauties at this school, but how come none of them are our partners?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone has one.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: N-no! I mean, I don't really...

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Wait, didn't you say you went on a trip with Amy?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Did nothing really happen?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Nothing had happened, but why was his face heating up?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh? Nothing?
Shirone's face turned red.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Seriously? That sounds suspicious.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: You better come clean!
Shirone glanced around.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh, whatever!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm going to sleep! I'm so tired these days.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wake me up in an hour!
Sleep was the best way to clear his mind.
When Shirone woke up, he got up from the sofa.
His friends had already left for the dormitory.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What time is it?
A note was left on the table.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We left early.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You looked tired, so get some rest and meet us at the dining hall later.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And whatever you do, don't look at the red book in the safe under the table.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's amazing.
Yawning, Shirone crumpled the note and stood up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Still, that nap felt great.
He gathered his toiletries and headed to the senior class building.
He planned to wash up at school and then go to the dining hall.
As he finished brushing his teeth and washing his face, the bell rang, signaling 5 o'clock.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yawn.
Yawning away the remnants of sleep, he walked down the hallway when he heard music from somewhere.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What's that?
Someone was singing in the music room at the end of the hall.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It wasn't a classical piece but a popular song.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow, they're really good.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The singing was impressively skilled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Could it be a professional singer?'
When he opened the music room door, he saw Maya playing the piano and singing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was a lively rhythm and blues song called 'Nothing is More Beautiful Than You,' which she used to hum while wandering through the village.
As soon as he opened the door, her voice hit him, sending chills down his spine.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Nothing is more beautiful than you

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It wasn't just that she sang well.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even though he knew nothing about music, he was certain of it the moment he heard her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Maya's singing was something special.
